value_chain_position: Banking software platform layer — sells cloud-based digital banking and lending infrastructure (online/mobile banking, lending origination, account opening) to community banks and credit unions.
relative_comps: Q2 is the leading independent digital banking platform for community/regional FIs, competing against legacy core giants FIS and Fiserv and the focused nCino in lending. Its 14% YoY revenue growth and 24% FCF margin are solid but below nCino's growth rate; it commands a meaningful premium over legacy players given cloud-native architecture and switching costs. The ~$2.8B market cap represents modest premium to recurring revenue, leaving room vs. FIS/Fiserv on relative growth but trading tighter than pure-SaaS peers.
